title: Non-compliant matching JSON: missing statement of composition on Amaretto (defocus-blur, level 4, tilt-left)

form_data.reason: Liqueurs and specialty spirits require a statement of composition.

image_prompt: Photorealistic classic Italian-style curved bottle with a romantic gold and black label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Bella Notte', 'Amaretto', '28% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Bella Spirits, New York, NY'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Readable photo: focus is slightly soft but label text remains legible. Camera orientation is tilt-left (-15 degrees).
